Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Steward]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Steward sends messages through senior Guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Steward is a title or role held by Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Steward's body was bleeding and he had no pulse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Steward's body is wearing armor that needs to be removed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Steward is reported to be dead but is actually alive and has been stabbed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder considers reclaiming the Steward's position as a way to pursue his grudge against Shera later.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — The Steward is an ordinary man and a child.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Steward was gone along with the Champions.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
